name: HEXAGON AB Namn-Aktier B (fria)
summary: Hexagon AB provides information technology solutions that drive productivity and quality across geospatial and industrial landscapes; it offers a broad range of products and services, including software, sensors, and autonomous solutions. The company operates through various segments, including Geosystems, Manufacturing Intelligence, and PPM (Process, Power & Marine). Hexagon AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
